---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new analysis block, robustness check, or workflow improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Proposal

Describe the requested feature.

## Motivation

Why is this needed for the project goals?

## Scope

- [ ] Notebook structure
- [ ] Data QA
- [ ] Statistical analysis
- [ ] Classification / leakage control
- [ ] Interpretation / reporting

## Acceptance criteria

List clear, testable criteria.

## Risks / caveats

Any assumptions, potential confounding, or methodological risks.
